selection.owner_acceptance_basis: The project owner instructed Codex to commit and push the completed recommendation tranche and then work on the next tranche after being told that the next decision was acceptance of the transition pilot and its successor-version contract.
selection.scope: The selection decision froze the pilot without starting source movement or changing B14/B15. The accepted Phase 1 closeout later authorised the Phase 2 package/loading foundation only; calculation movement, caller routing and performance optimisation remain outside this scope.

successor.checkpoint_scope: First modular migration development checkpoint; not the public Workbench, beta or release-candidate version.
successor.compatibility_launcher_rule: The launcher must remain small and delegate to the authoritative tracktemplate package. It must not contain or become a second maintained copy of B15.

functions.name: clothoid_entry_displacement
functions.return_contract: Three-float tuple (local X millimetres, local Y millimetres, heading radians).

functions.name: transition_start_signed_offset
functions.return_contract: One float signed tangent offset in canonical local-left-turn millimetres.

functions.name: solve_transition_length
functions.return_contract: One float transition length in millimetres.

module_boundary.migration_route: At the Phase 3 routing step, bind all three legacy global names to the temporary façade in the B16 development composition path so every recorded external caller reaches the modular implementation without editing B14 or B15.
module_boundary.current_input_policy: Mechanical parity only. Preserve existing supported finite inputs and exact diagnostics; retain positive total_angle as a caller precondition and do not add finite/non-positive-angle validation during extraction.
module_boundary.behaviour_change_policy: Validation hardening, formula cleanup, tolerance changes and optimisation require later separate accepted changes.

parity_contract.comparison: Exact Python value/type equality and exact exception type/text between B14, B15 and the modular implementation; no tolerance widening is permitted for the mechanical extraction.

error_cases.required_text: A clothoid radius must be greater than zero.
A clothoid radius must be greater than zero.
The radius for 'Bad Radius' must be greater than zero.
Entry spacing for 'Track 2' cannot be produced

parity_contract.real_freecad_scope: Run the affected plain-line and connected-straight GUI workflows under the successor composition path after routing exists; B14/B15 evidence remains unchanged.

performance_contract.purpose: Guard against regression; the pilot is not expected or required to make operator-visible work faster.
performance_contract.calculation_profile: Record repeated legacy and modular execution of the complete parity grid in the same standalone process/environment, reporting individual runs, median and range without using the result as an interaction budget.
workflow_profiles: Plain-line left/right replacement under the fixed Phase 1 fixture.
Connected-straight creation and edit under the fixed Phase 1 fixture.
performance_contract.comparison_rule: Use PERFORMANCE_SOP.md with equivalent inputs, process/cache state and output scope. Report every delta; do not claim improvement from this architecture pilot.
performance_contract.acceptance_rule: No material regression beyond measured run-to-run noise, with all correctness oracles passing. Numerical thresholds require separate baseline evidence and owner acceptance.

rollback_contract.legacy_reference_retention: Keep B14 immutable and B15 byte-identical as comparison/recovery evidence.
rollback_contract.pre_routing_rollback: Before any production caller is routed, removing the new package and reserved launcher must restore the exact pre-pilot repository behaviour.
rollback_contract.routed_rollback: The B16 development composition path must retain an explicit switch capable of routing all three names back to the captured B15 implementations until parity, standalone import, FreeCAD workflow and performance gates are accepted.
rollback_contract.retirement_gate: Remove the legacy comparison switch only after Phase 3 parity evidence and explicit project-owner acceptance; do not retire B14/B15 artifacts as part of this pilot.

implementation_gates: Phase 1 was accepted and closed on 2026-07-22; the bounded Phase 2 package/loading foundation was subsequently accepted and Phase 2 closed on 2026-07-22 without broadening that authority.

Phase 3 is current. The minimum tracktemplate skeleton and small TrackTemplate.FCMacro B16 composition root exist; calculation movement and caller routing are authorised only through this contract and have not started.
Create only the package locations required by this three-function slice.
Prove standalone import without FreeCAD, Part, Qt, pivy or third-party dependencies before caller routing.
Run legacy-versus-modular parity before routing any caller, then route all three external callers together through the temporary façade.
Keep mechanical extraction separate from validation-policy changes, cleanup and optimisation.
Do not change B14 or B15; any runtime integration belongs to the reserved B16 development composition path.
